title: Revalidate or invalidate stale bridge auth bindings after daemon or authority changes
summary: Bridge auth now invalidates stale injected credentials after upstream rejection, exposes stale bridge state with recovery guidance, and is covered by targeted transport tests; full cargo test remains blocked by unrelated prism-store pragma-count assertions.

acceptance.label: Bridge auth state is revalidated against the live authority after restart or on first authoritative mutation.
Stale credential bindings are cleared or refreshed automatically, or fail with accurate user-facing state instead of misleading readiness.
